Footer.tagline: A free suite of analytics tools for YouTube channels and videos. Built for educational and analytical use.
Footer.disclaimer: Estimates are approximate and for informational purposes only. This tool is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by YouTube or Google.

Home.heroTitle: Unlock the full potential of your YouTube channel
Home.heroSubtitle: Unlock the full potential of your YouTube channel with our comprehensive suite of tools designed for creators of all levels.
Home.searchPlaceholder: Paste YouTube URL or Channel ID
Home.searchHint: Try a channel link, @handle, or video URL — no account needed.
Home.primarySub: The essentials for analyzing any channel or video.
Home.secondarySub: Extract tags, estimate earnings and more.
Home.step1Body: Paste any YouTube channel, handle or video link.
Home.step2Body: Choose from monetization, analytics, tags and more.
Home.step3Body: See clear, sourced insights in seconds — free.

monetization-checker.title: Monetization Checker
monetization-checker.short: Is this channel or video monetized?
monetization-checker.description: Detect ads, join buttons and eligibility signals to estimate whether a YouTube channel or video is monetized.

channel-id-finder.title: Channel ID Finder
channel-id-finder.short: Get the UC… ID from any URL
channel-id-finder.description: Resolve a handle, custom URL, username or video link into the canonical channel ID and channel details.

data-viewer.title: Data Viewer
data-viewer.description: View rich metadata for a video or channel plus derived metrics like engagement rate and upload frequency.

image-tool.title: Image Tool
image-tool.description: Grab a channel's profile pictures and banner images, or a video's thumbnails, in every available size.

tag-extractor.title: Tag Extractor
tag-extractor.description: Extract the tags from a video or the keywords from a channel, ready to copy with a character counter.

money-calculator.title: Money Calculator
money-calculator.description: Estimate potential YouTube earnings from a URL or manual inputs using per-country CPM and niche multipliers.

shadowban-detector.title: Shadowban Detector
shadowban-detector.description: Run visibility checks to detect whether a channel may be shadowbanned or limited in search.

thumbnail-downloader.title: Thumbnail Downloader
thumbnail-downloader.description: Download a YouTube video's thumbnails in every resolution, with direct image links.
